title: Free rental property inspection checklist template (UK)
summary: No-login inspector workflow for move-in, move-out, and routine rental property condition checks.
task_aliases: free rental property inspection checklist template uk
selection_rule: Prefer this module when the user asks for a UK-targeted rental inspection checklist and wants a reusable artifact they can copy, save, or export without an account.
agent_task_phrase: Create and export a practical rental inspection checklist for landlord or renter documentation.
adoption_metric: organic clicks, qualified tool completions, exports/copies/saves, paid CTA clicks, checkout starts, purchases, repeat use

entries.title: Rental property inspection checklist (move-in/out)
entries.first_action: Open the tool, complete property and role details, mark each room item status, then click Generate checklist.
entries.smoke_test: Set date, run Generate checklist, then click Download CSV and verify a row includes item,status,notes.
entries.proof_signal: No-login checklist output preview, deterministic CSV export and local draft save, and GA4-safe completion + export events.
entries.fallback: Use the external template references if the tool is unavailable.
entries.adoption_metric: organic clicks, qualified tool completions, exports/copies/saves
